The '''Mobile Missile Launcher''' was a mobile anti-air vehicle used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. It was in essence an armored [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeder]] fitted with a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] launcher, which was able to spin 360 degrees to target incoming aerial units. The Heavy Mobile Missile Launcher was an upgraded version with two launchers.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Mobile Missile Launchers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
